description:
New file: cmd/bw/version_check_test.go

Test cases:
- Cache miss triggers API call
- Cache hit within 24h skips API call
- Failed API call still writes timestamp (no retry next command)
- Newer version found creates upgrade bead
- Newer version found updates existing upgrade bead (label match)
- Same or older version found does nothing
- Auto-close on upgrade success

Use injectable dependencies for HTTP, clock, and store operations.
title: Tests for version check
